raw.message:
Wait... did that baby duckling just go "peep peep" and stumble over its own feet? 🦆🐤🐤🐤
Watch mama duck lead her tiny fluffy squad across your island! The peeping, waddling, splashing chaos is almost too cute to handle.
Your heart doesn't stand a chance! 💛

hook.summary: Cute ducklings chirping in a nest followed by a mother duck walking.
hook.visual_action: A close-up of a nest with ducklings transitions to them following a mother duck along a riverbank.

scene_flow: Close-up of ducklings chirping in a nest.
Ducklings following a mother duck along a riverbank.
Mother duck and ducklings sleeping peacefully on the grass.
Various animals like bears and foxes interacting with the environment.
Wide view of the lush, multi-tiered animal island with waterfalls.
on_screen_text: Come to our island and relax, peep!
cta_text: Come to our island and relax, peep!
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers seeking a relaxing, cozy, and aesthetically pleasing idle or simulation game.
